name: Nifty Utilities
description: Free browser-based utilities for CSV/spreadsheet data, personal finance, documents, home and life decisions, business math, images, and everyday tasks.
privacy: Every tool runs locally in the visitor's browser. There is no backend, upload endpoint, database, or account — tool inputs are never transmitted to or stored by the site.

tools.name: Bank Statement Cleaner
tools.description: Standardize dates, amounts, descriptions, and blank rows in statement CSVs.

tools.name: Recurring Subscription Finder
tools.description: Find merchants and charges that appear on a repeating schedule.

tools.name: Merchant Name Normalizer
tools.description: Turn noisy transaction descriptions into consistent merchant names.

tools.name: Personal Spending Categorizer
tools.description: Assign common spending categories using editable keyword rules.

tools.name: Duplicate Transaction Finder
tools.description: Flag transactions with matching dates, amounts, and descriptions.

tools.name: CSV Bank Format Converter
tools.description: Map statement columns into a simple date, description, amount format.

tools.name: Credit Card Statement Analyzer
tools.description: Summarize charges by category and merchant from a CSV statement.

tools.name: Debt Snowball Calculator
tools.description: Estimate a payoff schedule using smallest-balance-first payments.

tools.name: Debt Avalanche Calculator
tools.description: Estimate a payoff schedule using highest-interest-first payments.

tools.name: Net Worth Tracker
tools.description: Track assets and liabilities locally in this browser.

tools.name: Merge CSV Files
tools.description: Combine multiple CSV files that share the same columns.

tools.name: Split CSV Files
tools.description: Break a large CSV into smaller files by row count.

tools.name: Remove Duplicate Rows
tools.description: Remove repeated rows using all columns or selected columns.

tools.name: Compare Two CSVs
tools.description: Find rows that were added, removed, or kept between two files.

tools.name: Excel to CSV Cleaner
tools.description: Convert an Excel sheet to clean CSV in your browser.

tools.name: Column Mapper
tools.description: Rename and reorder columns into a target schema.

tools.name: CSV Formula Generator
tools.description: Build spreadsheet formulas from a plain-English recipe.

tools.name: Spreadsheet Error Finder
tools.description: Scan CSV data for blanks, inconsistent widths, and suspicious values.

tools.name: Delimiter Converter
tools.description: Convert comma, tab, semicolon, or pipe-delimited data.

tools.name: JSON ↔ CSV Converter
tools.description: Convert arrays of JSON objects to CSV and CSV back to JSON.

tools.name: Image Format Converter
tools.description: Convert HEIC, PNG, JPG, WebP, and AVIF photos to PNG, JPG, or WebP.

tools.name: Image Compressor
tools.description: Shrink JPG, PNG, and WebP file sizes with a quality slider and a live before-and-after comparison.

tools.name: Image Resizer
tools.description: Resize images to exact pixels, a percentage, or common social-media sizes.

tools.name: Images to PDF Converter
tools.description: Combine JPG, PNG, and WebP images into one PDF with selectable page size.

tools.name: PDF Merger & Splitter
tools.description: Merge PDFs into one file, or pull out the pages you need from a single PDF.

tools.name: PDF to Image Converter
tools.description: Render every page of a PDF as a downloadable PNG or JPG image.

tools.name: PDF & Word Text Extractor
tools.description: Pull clean text out of PDF and DOCX files with instant word and character counts.

tools.name: Markdown to HTML Converter
tools.description: Convert Markdown to clean HTML with a live preview, or turn HTML back into Markdown.

tools.name: SVG to PNG Converter
tools.description: Rasterize an SVG to PNG at any size, or generate a full favicon size set.

tools.name: EXIF Viewer & Remover
tools.description: See the hidden metadata in a photo — including GPS location — and download a clean copy.

tools.name: Audio Converter & Trimmer
tools.description: Convert audio files to MP3 or WAV and trim the start and end.

tools.name: CSV to Excel Converter
tools.description: Turn one or more CSV files into a downloadable Excel workbook.

tools.name: Percentage Calculator
tools.description: Work out X% of Y, what percent one number is of another, and percent change.

tools.name: Age Calculator
tools.description: Find an exact age in years, months, and days, plus weeks, days, and the next birthday.

tools.name: Date Calculator
tools.description: Count days between dates, add or subtract time, or count business days.

tools.name: Tip Calculator
tools.description: Split a bill, set a tip percentage, and get the per-person total with optional rounding.

tools.name: Loan & Mortgage Calculator
tools.description: Estimate a monthly payment, total interest, and a full amortization schedule.

tools.name: Salary to Hourly Calculator
tools.description: Convert between hourly, weekly, monthly, and annual pay from any starting figure.

tools.name: BMI Calculator
tools.description: Estimate body mass index from height and weight in metric or imperial units.

tools.name: GPA Calculator
tools.description: Add your courses, grades, and credits for a weighted and unweighted GPA.

tools.name: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator
tools.description: Estimate a due date and current week from a last period, conception, or IVF date.

tools.name: Time Zone Meeting Planner
tools.description: Compare one meeting time across several time zones with daylight-saving handled.

tools.name: Bill of Sale Generator
tools.description: Create a printable general-purpose bill of sale.

tools.name: Rent Receipt Generator
tools.description: Create a clean receipt for a rent payment.

tools.name: Mileage Log Generator
tools.description: Build and export a mileage log for business trips.

tools.name: Equipment Inventory Generator
tools.description: Record equipment, serial numbers, locations, and values.

tools.name: Invoice Number Generator
tools.description: Generate sequential, dated, or random invoice numbers.

tools.name: Business Asset Register
tools.description: Create a downloadable register of business assets.

tools.name: Home Inventory Generator
tools.description: Catalog household belongings and estimated replacement values.

tools.name: Estate Inventory Worksheet
tools.description: Organize estate assets, debts, accounts, and notes.

tools.name: Affidavit Generator
tools.description: Draft a basic affidavit worksheet for review and notarization.

tools.name: Printable Receipt Generator
tools.description: Create a simple printable receipt for a payment or sale.

tools.name: Rent vs Buy Calculator
tools.description: Compare estimated monthly and long-term renting and buying costs.

tools.name: Lease vs Buy Calculator
tools.description: Compare the estimated net cost of leasing and buying a vehicle.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Pool
tools.description: Estimate annual pool chemicals, energy, service, and repair costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Boat
tools.description: Estimate financing, fuel, storage, insurance, and maintenance.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning an RV
tools.description: Estimate financing, campsites, fuel, storage, and maintenance.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Horse
tools.description: Estimate annual boarding, feed, farrier, vet, and training costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Dog
tools.description: Estimate annual food, vet, grooming, insurance, and boarding costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Cat
tools.description: Estimate annual food, litter, vet, and supply costs for a cat.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Hot Tub
tools.description: Estimate annual energy, chemicals, water, and service costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Car
tools.description: Estimate financing, fuel, insurance, maintenance, and registration costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Raising Backyard Chickens
tools.description: Estimate annual feed, bedding, health, and coop costs for a flock.

tools.name: Real Cost of Lawn Care
tools.description: Estimate annual mowing, fertilizer, irrigation, and equipment costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Septic System
tools.description: Estimate annual pumping, inspection, repair, and drainfield reserve costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Motorcycle
tools.description: Estimate financing, fuel, insurance, tires, gear, and registration costs.

tools.name: Solar Panel Payback Calculator
tools.description: Estimate net system cost after incentives, annual savings, and payback period.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Rental Property
tools.description: Estimate mortgage, operating costs, vacancy, and annual rental cash flow.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning an Electric Car
tools.description: Estimate financing, charging, insurance, tires, maintenance, and registration costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Jet Ski
tools.description: Estimate annual storage, fuel, insurance, winterization, and registration costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Second Home
tools.description: Estimate mortgage, property tax, insurance, utilities, upkeep, and travel costs.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Classic Car
tools.description: Estimate agreed-value insurance, storage, upkeep, and appreciation for a collector car.

tools.name: Real Cost of Owning a Vacation Rental
tools.description: Estimate mortgage, operating costs, platform fees, and net short-term rental income.

tools.name: Moving Cost Estimator
tools.description: Estimate truck, movers, mileage, supplies, lodging, and other costs.

tools.name: Roommate Expense Splitter
tools.description: Split shared expenses evenly or by custom percentages.

tools.name: Home Maintenance Budget Calculator
tools.description: Build an annual maintenance reserve from home value, age, and systems.

tools.name: Property Tax Estimator
tools.description: Estimate annual and monthly property tax from assessed value and rate.

tools.name: Property Tax Appeal Estimator
tools.description: Gauge appeal success odds and tax savings from your assessment, purchase price, and comparable homes.

tools.name: Vacation Budget Planner
tools.description: Plan transportation, lodging, food, activities, and contingency spending.

tools.name: Lead Value Calculator
tools.description: Estimate the expected revenue and profit value of each lead.

tools.name: Customer Lifetime Value Calculator
tools.description: Estimate customer value using revenue, margin, churn, and acquisition cost.

tools.name: Cost of Missed Calls Calculator
tools.description: Estimate revenue lost when customer calls go unanswered.

tools.name: Cost of Employee Turnover Calculator
tools.description: Estimate recruiting, vacancy, training, and productivity costs.

tools.name: Hourly Rate Calculator
tools.description: Turn income goals and business costs into a sustainable hourly rate.

tools.name: Profit Margin Calculator
tools.description: Calculate gross profit, margin, markup, and target sale price.

tools.name: Break-Even Calculator
tools.description: Find the units and revenue needed to cover fixed costs.

tools.name: Job Cost Calculator
tools.description: Calculate labor, materials, overhead, markup, and job price.

tools.name: Service Pricing Calculator
tools.description: Price a service from time, costs, overhead, and desired margin.

tools.name: Sales Commission Calculator
tools.description: Calculate tiered or flat sales commissions.

tools.name: Social Security Claiming Age Calculator
tools.description: Compare a planned claiming age with full retirement age and estimate the monthly adjustment.

tools.name: Required Minimum Distribution Calculator
tools.description: Estimate an owner RMD using the IRS Uniform Lifetime Table and a prior year-end balance.

tools.name: Tax Refund Timing Estimator
tools.description: Build a typical federal refund processing window from the return type and accepted date.

tools.name: FMLA Eligibility Calculator
tools.description: Screen the four basic federal employee-eligibility requirements for FMLA leave.

tools.name: Naturalization Residency Date Calculator
tools.description: Estimate the 90-day early-filing date and screen residence and physical-presence inputs.

tools.name: I-94 Admit Until Date Calculator
tools.description: Compare a planned departure or current date with a date-certain I-94 admission record.

tools.name: Small Claims Deadline Calculator
tools.description: Apply a locally verified limitation period and personal safety margin to a claim date.

tools.name: Screenshot Measurement Calculator
tools.description: Draw on a photo, set one known length, and estimate wall lengths, dimensions, and floor area.

tools.name: Receipt Scanner & Warranty Tracker
tools.description: Scan a receipt, capture the purchase, and create a warranty expiration reminder for your calendar.

tools.name: Screenshot to CSV
tools.description: Extract text from a screenshot and arrange detected lines as CSV.

tools.name: Screenshot Table Extractor
tools.description: Use in-browser OCR to turn a table image into editable rows.

tools.name: Image Dimensions Inspector
tools.description: Inspect pixel size, aspect ratio, file type, and file size.

tools.name: Bulk File Renamer
tools.description: Preview cleaned, numbered filenames and download renamed copies.

tools.name: Filename Cleaner
tools.description: Remove clutter, normalize spacing, and standardize filename casing.

tools.name: Duplicate Photo Detector
tools.description: Find exact duplicate images using local file hashes.

tools.name: QR Batch Generator
tools.description: Generate multiple downloadable QR codes from lines of text.

tools.name: Barcode Generator
tools.description: Generate a printable CODE128 barcode in the browser.

tools.name: UPC Validator
tools.description: Validate UPC-A check digits or calculate a missing check digit.

tools.name: VIN Decoder
tools.description: Validate a VIN and decode its year and basic structure locally.

tools.name: Word & Character Counter
tools.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs with an instant reading-time estimate.

tools.name: Case Converter
tools.description: Switch text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, sentence case, camelCase, and snake_case.

tools.name: Text Diff Checker
tools.description: Compare two blocks of text line by line and see exactly what was added, removed, or changed.

tools.name: JSON Formatter & Validator
tools.description: Pretty-print, minify, and validate JSON with a clear pointer to the first syntax error.

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.description: Create strong random passwords with custom length and character sets — generated locally, never sent anywhere.

tools.name: UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate one or many version 4 UUIDs and copy them individually or as a list.

tools.name: Hash Generator
tools.description: Compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes of text or a file, right in your browser.

tools.name: Random Picker
tools.description: Paste a list of names or options and draw one or more winners at random — fair and instant.

tools.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.description: Generate placeholder paragraphs, sentences, or words for mockups and layouts.

tools.name: Signature Drawer
tools.description: Draw a signature with your mouse or finger and download it as a transparent PNG.

tools.name: Countdown Timer & Stopwatch
tools.description: Run a countdown, stopwatch, or Pomodoro focus timer with an alert when time is up.

tools.name: IQ Test
tools.description: Estimate your reasoning ability with an original, timed test spanning pattern, number, verbal, and spatial puzzles.

tools.name: Typing Speed Test
tools.description: Type a passage and measure your live WPM and accuracy in timed, word-count, or quote modes — your keystrokes never leave your browser.

tools.name: Reaction Time Test
tools.description: Click the moment the pad turns green across five rounds to measure your average reaction time in milliseconds.

tools.name: Click Speed Test
tools.description: Click a pad as fast as you can in 5, 10, or 30 seconds to find your clicks-per-second (CPS) score.

tools.name: Memory Test
tools.description: See how many digits your working memory can hold with a progressive digit-span recall test.

tools.name: Color Blindness Test
tools.description: Take a free at-home Ishihara-style red-green color-vision screening with plates drawn fresh in your browser.

tools.name: Love Calculator
tools.description: Enter two names for an instant, just-for-fun compatibility score — the same pair always gives the same result.

tools.name: Personality Type Test
tools.description: Find your dominant personality type and your affinity for every type with an original color-style profiler.

tools.name: Zodiac Compatibility
tools.description: See how any two star signs work together, with an in-depth strengths breakdown and a few things to watch.

tools.name: Falling Letters
tools.description: Type each letter before it drifts to the floor — a fast, fun way to learn where every key is, with capitals mixing in as you speed up.

tools.name: Word Cannon
tools.description: Blast words out of the air by typing them before they land, building whole-word typing speed as they come faster and longer.

tools.name: Balloon Pop
tools.description: Pop rising balloons by typing the letter each one carries before it escapes the top — cheerful key-finding practice.

tools.name: Key Trainer
tools.description: A key lights up on an on-screen keyboard — press it fast. Learn the layout from the home row out to every key.

tools.name: Word Sprint
tools.description: Type as many words as you can in 60 seconds as they grow longer, then see your word count and WPM.

tools.name: Musical Typing
tools.description: Type a home-row-to-whole-keyboard drill while each keystroke plays the next note of a public-domain tune.

tools.name: Key Memory
tools.description: Watch keys light up in sequence, then type them back from memory — a Simon-style workout for key positions.

tools.name: ZType
tools.description: Play ZType, the free word-shooter typing game, embedded here — type the words on incoming ships to blast them.
